text: A whale is a large marine mammal that breathes air through blowholes
original_text: A whale is a large marine mammal that breathes air through blowholes.

text: whales are warm-blooded, give birth to live young, and nurse their calves
original_text: Whales are warm-blooded, give birth to live young, and nurse their calves.

text: some whales filter tiny food from water using baleen
original_text: Some whales filter tiny food from water using baleen.

text: toothed whales hunt fish, squid, and other prey
original_text: Toothed whales hunt fish, squid, and other prey.
The meatball considers whales majestic submarines with songs.
